name: France
authority: Autorité de contrôle prudentiel et de résolution (ACPR) / AMF

unhostedWallets.notes: Under EU TFR, CASPs must verify self-hosted wallet ownership for transfers exceeding EUR 1,000. ACPR supervises AML/CFT compliance. PSAN registration transitioning to MiCA licensing.

rules.notes: EU TFR (Regulation 2023/1113) applies zero threshold to all CASP-to-CASP crypto transfers from December 30, 2024. Originator must provide name, account number, and one of: address, ID document number, or date/place of birth (alternatives, not all mandatory simultaneously).
